metadata.description: BladeForge — aquivalabs Claude Code skills marketplace.

plugins.name: scout
plugins.description: Passive skill that reads the compiled catalog to discover/recommend/install marketplace skills, surfaces declared side effects, and treats catalog text as untrusted data.

plugins.name: cerberus
plugins.description: CERBERUS — leak guard for a public skills marketplace. A PostToolUse hook reminds you to run the cerberus:leak-check skill on every skill/reference/eval edit; that agent pass rewrites anything pointing to a real work codebase (real class/object/namespace/org/ticket names, secrets, real people/emails, an employer brand, or the aggregate product flavor) into a neutral fictional demo. No denylist by design.

plugins.name: cicero
plugins.description: CICERO — the house voice. The 14 communication rules (bottom line first, concise, plain language, recommend-don't-survey, push back with reasons, calibrated honesty, stay in scope) ship as a force-for-plugin output style applied at the system-prompt level; a SessionStart hook shows a banner and picks the conversation language, and a UserPromptSubmit hook keeps the reply language current.

plugins.name: diagram
plugins.description: Architecture / flow diagram authoring — turn a spec or raw code into a readable, clickable D2→ELK diagram (classes with methods, objects, permission sets, relations) as a browsable HTML page under docs/diagrams/<name>/. Node contents come from an Atlas entity list that parallel Sextant reviewer agents harden to zero edits.

plugins.name: frontend-css
plugins.description: Personal frontend CSS skills — rem units, SCSS modules.

plugins.name: frontend-react
plugins.description: Frontend React skills — component structure, hooks registry, skeleton components, Storybook stories.

plugins.name: frontend
plugins.description: Personal frontend dev-harness skills — types + tests runner.

plugins.name: git
plugins.description: Personal Git workflow skills — atomic commit splitting.

plugins.name: meta
plugins.description: Personal meta skills — authoring new skills.

plugins.name: review
plugins.description: Stack-agnostic pre-push review framework — 5 reviewer agents, the /review orchestrator, and the secret-scan + attestation gate, all driven by a per-project .claude/review.config.json.

plugins.name: salesforce
plugins.description: Personal Salesforce skills — Apex test authoring standard and salesforce-dx MCP usage.
